calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-14-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Will Chen, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Susan Lee CSR/Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Toshi Michi Takihata, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff VSSF Associates LLC.
Christina Dabis representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Batcha Hunde Odda aka Batcha Odda aka Batcha H. Odda is present.
Tiffany Wong and Allison Moser representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was not filed.

This case settled, the trial date of March 17, 2008 is vacated.
